title: gastrorchis lutea var. geffrayi
intro: Gastrorchis lutea var. geffrayi, also known as the geffray's orchid, is a rare and exotic orchid species native to Madagascar. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The geffray's orchid is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
